arts.ttl: Everton get cruel reminder at Finch Farm as search for injury answers continues
arts.sum: Everton FC correspondent Joe Thomas reports from Finch Farm after Sean Dyche's pre-Ipswich Town press conference

arts.ttl: Sean Dyche: Thomas Tuchel right for England job but most would like English boss
arts.sum: German Tuchel has been appointed new England coach on an 18-month deal

arts.ttl: Ipswich Town transfer news: Tractors boys interested in 21-time international?
arts.sum: Ipswich Town are reportedly interested in signing Chelsea defender Ben Chilwell in January, with the left-back desperate to secure first-team football.

arts.ttl: Friedkin Group can solve overdue Everton problem at new stadium to make perfect first impression
arts.sum: On the anniversary of Neville Southall's debut, ECHO Everton reporter Chris Beesley has reiterated his desire for the Blues to build a statue of their record-breaking former goalkeeper at their new stadium

arts.ttl: Preview: Ipswich Town vs. Everton - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Premier League clash between Ipswich Town and Everton, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Everton lineup vs. Ipswich: Predicted XI for early Premier League six-pointer
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Everton could line up for their trip to Ipswich Town in the Premier League on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Ipswich lineup vs. Everton: Predicted XI as hosts chase first Premier League win
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Ipswich Town could line up in their home clash with Everton in the Premier League on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Ipswich Town: Everton boss Sean Dyche on Blues' Premier League start
arts.oTtl: East Anglican Daily Times - Ispwich Town FC
arts.sum: While he agrees that it's an opportunity to get points on the board, he knows that there's no easy games in the Premier League, that Town have spent 'a recognised fortune' in order to fulfil their aims of consolidating at this level, making them a tough opponent. In some games, you think you’ve got a handle on it and it goes away from you.

arts.ttl: Everton tribute to my dad always makes me smile - it is the first thing I look for at Goodison Park
arts.sum: Howard Kendall died on this day in 2015 and his son Simon spoke to the ECHO about his father's legacy at Everton

arts.ttl: Everton suffer major new injury blow with Jarrad Branthwaite fitness decision imminent
arts.sum: Sean Dyche discussed the fitness of Jarrad Branthwaite and other players in his squad ahead of Everton's trip to Ipswich Town
